data.label: ARIA Wire Fraud Webhook
data.description: HTTP Webhook event trigger fired by the ARIA backend when a wire fraud dispute call is initiated.

activity.description: Triggers instantly when an event has occured

data.label: FraudIntelligence
data.description: AI-powered fraud risk analysis stage — Agent_BankingFraudInvestigation analyzes transaction data, scores risk, and classifies the fraud type.

data.label: MultiPartyVerification
data.description: Parallel verification stage — dispatches outbound calls to vendor (Qubi) and carrier (Larry) sub-agents simultaneously; waits for a consolidated webhook callback to proceed.

data.label: ResolutionSynthesis
data.description: AI resolution synthesis stage — Agent_WireFraudResolutionSynthesis generates the final case narrative and ARIA response script based on all gathered evidence.

data.label: Resolution
data.description: Case resolution execution stage — Workflow_CallbackLivekitBanking delivers the AI-generated resolution to ARIA, which reads it verbatim to Elena.

data.label: ManualReview
data.description: Exception stage for human escalation — fraud analyst reviews the case, confirms or overrides the AI recommendation, and approves or declines wire recall.
